subtasks.description: Extract all parties from the multi-party contract, including party names, their roles (e.g., vendor, buyer, guarantor), and contact addresses. Return structured JSON with party records.

plan.cost_rationale: Single extract subtask at mid tier. Multi-field extraction (names, roles, addresses) from a contract document is moderate complexity and requires schema matching across multiple party records. Mid tier is appropriate for handling variable party counts and address parsing. No dependencies, no reconciliation needed — the document itself is the single source."
